description_long: This bungalow is a compact, single-story residential building with a simple rectangular footprint and flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, and the structure sits on a green base representing a lawn or yard. The building features a main entrance with a glass door and several windows distributed around the facade, providing natural light to the interior. The interior layout includes visible partitioned rooms, with some basic furnishings and fixtures apparent through the open roof and cutaway views. There is no visible porch or veranda, and the window arrangement is sparse and functional, with no decorative elements. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, green yard base, and simple window and door arrangement. The structure is compact and minimalistic, with visible interior rooms and basic furnishings.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above and slightly to the side, revealing the open roof and interior room layout, as well as the green yard base.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main entrance and glass door, highlighting the flat roof and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and one side of the bungalow, showing additional windows and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the opposite side, emphasizing the side windows and the open interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with sparse windows on all sides
